title: Walmart-backed Flipkart expands quick-commerce push as Amazon ramps up in India
summary: Flipkart has reached 1,000 micro-fulfillment centers as Amazon accelerates its quick-commerce operations in India. The expansion reflects intensifying competition between the two e-commerce giants in the country's fast-growing logistics market.
content: Walmart-backed Flipkart has crossed 1,000 micro-fulfillment centers as Amazon accelerates its own quick-commerce push in India.

zh.title: 沃尔玛支持的Flipkart在亚马逊加快印度快速商务扩张之际推进自身业务
zh.summary: 随着亚马逊加快在印度的快速商务运营，Flipkart已建成1000个微型物流中心。这一扩张反映了两大电商巨头在印度快速增长的物流市场中竞争的加剧。
